name: Vietnamese Grilled Steak Wraps
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef across the grain into thin slices.
2. In a medium bowl, combine lemon peel, juice, 2 tablespoons sugar, sesame oil, 1 teaspoon salt and black pepper. Mix well to coat the beef.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Combine water, vinegar, remaining 4 tablespoons sugar, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
5. Continue boiling for another 5 minutes without stirring until the mixture becomes syrupy. Stir in crushed red pepper. Set aside to cool.
6. Remove beef from the marinade and discard the marinade.
7. Thread the beef onto metal or wooden skewers (soak wooden skewers in hot water for 30 minutes if using).
8. Grill the beef over medium-hot briquets until cooked through, about 3 minutes per side.
9. Grill tortillas until they are hot.
10. Place lettuce, beef, mint and cilantro on each tortilla. Drizzle with the vinegar mixture.
11. Roll the tortillas to enclose the filling. Garnish with star fruit slices, bell pepper strips, and orange peel strips.
12. Makes 6 wraps. Each wrap contains 366 calories, 25g fat.
